public class ProductInventoryController {

    public String  productName    {get; set;}
    public String  serialNo       {get; set;}
    public Id      selectedId     {get; set;}
    public ProductInventory__c productRecord {get; set;}  // for date fields
    public List<ProductInventory__c> productList {get; set;}

    // Constructor
    public ProductInventoryController() {
        productRecord = new ProductInventory__c();
        loadProducts();
    }

    // ── Load All Records ─────────────────────────────────────────
    public void loadProducts() {
        productList = [
            SELECT Id, Name, SerialNo__c,
                   ManufactureDate__c, ExpiryDate__c
            FROM ProductInventory__c
            ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
        ];
    }

    // ── Insert Product ───────────────────────────────────────────
    public void insertProduct() {
        try {
            // Validate required fields
            if (productName == null || productName.trim() == '') {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'Product Name is required.'));
                return;
            }
            if (serialNo == null || serialNo.trim() == '') {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'Serial No is required.'));
                return;
            }
            // Validate expiry date is after manufacture date
            if (productRecord.ManufactureDate__c != null &&
                productRecord.ExpiryDate__c != null &&
                productRecord.ExpiryDate__c <= productRecord.ManufactureDate__c) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR,
                    'Expiry Date must be after Manufacture Date.'));
                return;
            }

            ProductInventory__c p = new ProductInventory__c();
            p.Name                = productName;
            p.SerialNo__c         = Decimal.valueOf(serialNo);
            p.ManufactureDate__c  = productRecord.ManufactureDate__c;
            p.ExpiryDate__c       = productRecord.ExpiryDate__c;
            insert p;

            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM, ' Product Inserted Successfully!'));
            clearFields();
            loadProducts();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // ── Select Product (load into form) ──────────────────────────
    public void selectProduct() {
        try {
            if (selectedId == null) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'No record selected.'));
                return;
            }
            ProductInventory__c p = [
                SELECT Id, Name, SerialNo__c,
                       ManufactureDate__c, ExpiryDate__c
                FROM ProductInventory__c
                WHERE Id = :selectedId
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            productName                      = p.Name;
            serialNo                         = String.valueOf(Integer.valueOf(p.SerialNo__c));
            productRecord.ManufactureDate__c = p.ManufactureDate__c;
            productRecord.ExpiryDate__c      = p.ExpiryDate__c;

        } catch (Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // ── Update Product ───────────────────────────────────────────
    public void updateProduct() {
        try {
            if (selectedId == null) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'Please select a record to update.'));
                return;
            }
            // Validate expiry date
            if (productRecord.ManufactureDate__c != null &&
                productRecord.ExpiryDate__c      != null &&
                productRecord.ExpiryDate__c <= productRecord.ManufactureDate__c) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR,
                    'Expiry Date must be after Manufacture Date.'));
                return;
            }

            ProductInventory__c p = new ProductInventory__c();
            p.Id                  = selectedId;
            p.Name                = productName;
            p.SerialNo__c         = Decimal.valueOf(serialNo);
            p.ManufactureDate__c  = productRecord.ManufactureDate__c;
            p.ExpiryDate__c       = productRecord.ExpiryDate__c;
            update p;

            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM, ' Product Updated Successfully!'));
            clearFields();
            loadProducts();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // ── Delete Product ───────────────────────────────────────────
    public void deleteProduct() {
        try {
            if (selectedId == null) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'Please select a record to delete.'));
                return;
            }
            ProductInventory__c p = new ProductInventory__c(Id = selectedId);
            delete p;

            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM, ' Product Deleted Successfully!'));
            clearFields();
            loadProducts();

        } catch (Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // ── Clear Fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    public void clearFields() {
        productName   = null;
        serialNo      = null;
        selectedId    = null;
        productRecord = new ProductInventory__c();
    }
} 

<apex:page controller="ProductInventoryController">
    <apex:form >

        <!-- ── INPUT FORM ───────────────────────────────────── -->
        <apex:pageBlock title="Product Inventory Management System"
                        id="formBlock">

            <apex:pageMessages id="msgBlock"/>
            <apex:inputHidden value="{!selectedId}"/>

            <apex:pageBlockSection title="Product Details" columns="1">

                <apex:inputText value="{!productName}"
                    label="Product Name"/>

                <apex:inputText value="{!serialNo}"
                    label="Serial No"/>

                <!-- Date fields use inputField with helper record -->
                <apex:inputField value="{!productRecord.ManufactureDate__c}"
                    label="Manufacture Date"/>

                <apex:inputField value="{!productRecord.ExpiryDate__c}"
                    label="Expiry Date"/>

            </apex:pageBlockSection>

            <apex:pageBlockButtons >
                <apex:commandButton value="Insert"
                    action="{!insertProduct}"
                    reRender="formBlock, tableBlock, msgBlock"
                    style="background-color:green; color:white;"/>

                <apex:commandButton value="Update"
                    action="{!updateProduct}"
                    reRender="formBlock, tableBlock, msgBlock"
                    style="background-color:blue; color:white;"/>

                <apex:commandButton value="Delete"
                    action="{!deleteProduct}"
                    reRender="formBlock, tableBlock, msgBlock"
                    style="background-color:red; color:white;"/>

                <apex:commandButton value="Clear"
                    action="{!clearFields}"
                    reRender="formBlock, msgBlock"
                    immediate="true"
                    style="background-color:gray; color:white;"/>
            </apex:pageBlockButtons>

        </apex:pageBlock>

        <!-- ── PRODUCT TABLE ────────────────────────────────── -->
        <apex:pageBlock title="Product Inventory Records" id="tableBlock">
            <apex:pageBlockTable value="{!productList}" var="p">

                <apex:column headerValue="Action">
                    <apex:commandButton value="Select"
                        action="{!selectProduct}"
                        reRender="formBlock, msgBlock">
                        <apex:param name="selectedId"
                                    value="{!p.Id}"
                                    assignTo="{!selectedId}"/>
                    </apex:commandButton>
                </apex:column>

                <apex:column value="{!p.Name}"
                             headerValue="Product Name"/>
                <apex:column value="{!p.SerialNo__c}"
                             headerValue="Serial No"/>
                <apex:column value="{!p.ManufactureDate__c}"
                             headerValue="Manufacture Date"/>
                <apex:column value="{!p.ExpiryDate__c}"
                             headerValue="Expiry Date"/>

            </apex:pageBlockTable>
        </apex:pageBlock>

    </apex:form>
</apex:page> 


public class StudentController {
    public Integer studentId        {get; set;}
    public String studentName       {get; set;}
    public String email             {get; set;}
    public String department        {get; set;}
    public Id selectedId            {get; set;}
    public Student__c studentRecord {get; set;}   // ← helper for date field
    public List<Student__c> studentList {get; set;}

    // Constructor
    public StudentController() {
        studentRecord = new Student__c();          // ← initialize helper
        loadStudents();
    }

    // Load Records
    public void loadStudents() {
        studentList = [
            SELECT Id, Name, Student_Id__c, Email__c, Birth_Date__c, Department__c
            FROM Student__c
        ];
    }

    // Insert Student
    public void insertStudent() {
        try {
            Student__c s = new Student__c();
            s.Student_Id__c = studentId;
            s.Name          = studentName;
            s.Email__c      = email;
            s.Birth_Date__c = studentRecord.Birth_Date__c;  // ← from helper
            s.Department__c = department;
            insert s;
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM, 'Student Inserted Successfully'));
            clearFields();
            loadStudents();
        } catch(Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // Select Student
    public void selectStudent() {
        try {
            if(selectedId == null) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'No record selected.'));
                return;
            }
            Student__c s = [
                SELECT Id, Name, Student_Id__c, Email__c, Birth_Date__c, Department__c
                FROM Student__c
                WHERE Id = :selectedId
                LIMIT 1
            ];
            studentId                      = Integer.valueOf(s.Student_Id__c);
            studentName                    = s.Name;
            email                          = s.Email__c;
            studentRecord.Birth_Date__c    = s.Birth_Date__c;  // ← into helper
            department                     = s.Department__c;
        } catch(Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // Update Student
    public void updateStudent() {
        try {
            if(selectedId == null) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'Please select a record to update.'));
                return;
            }
            Student__c s    = new Student__c();
            s.Id            = selectedId;
            s.Student_Id__c = studentId;
            s.Name          = studentName;
            s.Email__c      = email;
            s.Birth_Date__c = studentRecord.Birth_Date__c;  // ← from helper
            s.Department__c = department;
            update s;
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM, 'Student Updated Successfully'));
            clearFields();
            loadStudents();
        } catch(Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // Delete Student
    public void deleteStudent() {
        try {
            if(selectedId == null) {
                ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                    ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, 'Please select a record to delete.'));
                return;
            }
            Student__c s = new Student__c(Id = selectedId);
            delete s;
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM, 'Student Deleted Successfully'));
            clearFields();
            loadStudents();
        } catch(Exception e) {
            ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
                ApexPages.Severity.ERROR, e.getMessage()));
        }
    }

    // Clear Fields
    public void clearFields() {
        studentId              = null;
        studentName            = null;
        email                  = null;
        studentRecord          = new Student__c();  // ← resets date cleanly
        department             = null;
        selectedId             = null;
    }
} 

<apex:page controller="StudentController">
    <apex:form >

        <apex:pageBlock title="Student Management System" id="formBlock">
            <apex:pageMessages id="msgBlock"/>
            <apex:inputHidden value="{!selectedId}"/>

            <apex:pageBlockSection columns="1">
                <apex:inputText value="{!studentId}"
                                label="Student ID"/>
                <apex:inputText value="{!studentName}"
                                label="Student Name"/>
                <apex:inputText value="{!email}"
                                label="Email"/>

                <!-- ✅ FIXED: use inputField with helper record for date -->
                <apex:inputField value="{!studentRecord.Birth_Date__c}"
                                 label="Birth Date"/>

                <apex:inputText value="{!department}"
                                label="Department"/>
            </apex:pageBlockSection>

            <apex:pageBlockButtons >
                <apex:commandButton value="Insert"
                                    action="{!insertStudent}"
                                    reRender="formBlock, tableBlock, msgBlock"/>
                <apex:commandButton value="Update"
                                    action="{!updateStudent}"
                                    reRender="formBlock, tableBlock, msgBlock"/>
                <apex:commandButton value="Delete"
                                    action="{!deleteStudent}"
                                    reRender="formBlock, tableBlock, msgBlock"/>
                <apex:commandButton value="Clear"
                                    action="{!clearFields}"
                                    reRender="formBlock, msgBlock"
                                    immediate="true"/>
            </apex:pageBlockButtons>
        </apex:pageBlock>

        <apex:pageBlock title="Student Records" id="tableBlock">
            <apex:pageBlockTable value="{!studentList}" var="s">
                <apex:column headerValue="Action">
                    <apex:commandButton value="Select"
                                        action="{!selectStudent}"
                                        reRender="formBlock, msgBlock">
                        <apex:param name="selectedId"
                                    value="{!s.Id}"
                                    assignTo="{!selectedId}"/>
                    </apex:commandButton>
                </apex:column>
                <apex:column value="{!s.Student_Id__c}"  headerValue="Student ID"/>
                <apex:column value="{!s.Name}"           headerValue="Name"/>
                <apex:column value="{!s.Email__c}"       headerValue="Email"/>
                <apex:column value="{!s.Birth_Date__c}"  headerValue="Birth Date"/>
                <apex:column value="{!s.Department__c}"  headerValue="Department"/>
            </apex:pageBlockTable>
        </apex:pageBlock>

    </apex:form>
</apex:page>


public class Email {
	public String toAddress {get; set;}
	public String subject {get; set;}
	public String body {get; set;}

	public Blob fileBody {get; set;}
	public String fileName {get; set;}

	public void sendEmail() {

    System.debug('Entered sendEmail method');
    System.debug('To Address: ' + toAddress);
    System.debug('Subject: ' + subject);

    // Email validation (@gmail.com)
    if (String.isEmpty(toAddress) || !toAddress.endsWith('@gmail.com')) {
        System.debug('Invalid Email: Not a Gmail address');

        ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
            ApexPages.Severity.ERROR,
            'Please enter a valid Gmail address!'
        ));
        return;
    }

    // Subject validation (not empty)
    if (String.isEmpty(subject)) {
        System.debug('Invalid Subject: Subject is empty');

        ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
            ApexPages.Severity.ERROR,
            'Subject cannot be empty!'
        ));
        return;
    }

    System.debug('Validations passed');

    Messaging.SingleEmailMessage mail = new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage();

    mail.setToAddresses(new String[] {toAddress});
    mail.setSubject(subject);
    mail.setPlainTextBody(body);

    // Attachment
    if (fileBody != null && fileName != null) {
        System.debug('Adding attachment: ' + fileName);

        Messaging.EmailFileAttachment attachment = new Messaging.EmailFileAttachment();
        attachment.setFileName(fileName);
        attachment.setBody(fileBody);

        mail.setFileAttachments(new Messaging.EmailFileAttachment[] {attachment});
    }

    System.debug('Sending email...');

    Messaging.sendEmail(new Messaging.SingleEmailMessage[] {mail});

    System.debug('Email sent successfully');

    ApexPages.addMessage(new ApexPages.Message(
        ApexPages.Severity.CONFIRM,
        'Email Sent Successfully!'
    ));
}
}

<apex:page controller="Email" >
    <apex:form enctype="multipart/form-data">

    <apex:pageMessages />

    <apex:pageBlock title="Send Email">

        <apex:pageBlockSection columns="1">

            <apex:inputText label="To Email" value="{!toAddress}" />

            <apex:inputText label="Subject" value="{!subject}" />

            <apex:inputTextarea label="Body" value="{!body}" rows="5"/>

            <apex:inputFile value="{!fileBody}" filename="{!fileName}" />

        </apex:pageBlockSection>

        <apex:pageBlockButtons >
            <apex:commandButton value="Send Email" action="{!sendEmail}" />
        </apex:pageBlockButtons>

    </apex:pageBlock>

</apex:form>
</apex:page>
